prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Connectors & fasteners, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: missing hanger nails (empty holes). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: Simpson catalogs, IRC.
title: Compliance check: Connectors & fasteners (commercial project)
